TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Pete_Brennan, title = Pete_Brennan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pete_Brennan} }

S.FORM: kawas tay 1936 , ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 9, Pete Brennan, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2012) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
kawas tay 1936 , ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 9, Pete Brennan, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2012) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, pete βrennan, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
